compiled_state.title: Update per-worktree-review-commit.md and create attestation format contract
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update per-worktree-review-commit.md to replace the manual 6-8 call merge workflow with a single harvest-worktree.sh invocation. Create the attestation format contract documenting the test-gate-status and review-status file formats including the attest_source field.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md

### Files to create
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/harvest-attestation-format.md

### TDD exemption
Criterion 3: static assets only — non-executable instruction files. Structural boundary validated by check-referential-integrity.sh and check-contract-schemas.sh pre-commit hooks.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] per-worktree-review-commit.md references harvest-worktree.sh as the merge method
  Verify: grep -q 'harvest-worktree' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md
- [ ] Attestation format contract exists at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/harvest-attestation-format.md
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/harvest-attestation-format.md
- [ ] Contract documents test-gate-status format including attest_source field
  Verify: grep -q 'attest_source' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/harvest-attestation-format.md
- [ ] Contract documents review-status format including attest_source field
  Verify: grep -q 'review-status' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/harvest-attestation-format.md
- [ ] check-referential-integrity passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/check-referential-integrity.sh
